function.rulebook_notes: Completed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS.MD files before entering entity/project folders, and used canonical entity alias plus structured project linkage search.
function.outcome_justification: `10_entities/cast/nina.md` identifies the design partner entity alias as `nina`. Searching `40_projects` for `entity.nina` returned exactly two canonical project README files, both read directly: Northstar Ledger and Helios Workflow Sprint.
